---
title: "Feed RSS · Plant Science" 
#subtitle: "o le loro potenzialità"
description: "Lista alfabetica *(quasi)* completa di riviste scientifiche"
google-scholar: true
date: "2026-04-30"
lang: it
categories: [pubblicazioni, piante, RSS, IT 🇮🇹]
css: style_rss.css
image: "image.png"
toc-title: Su questa pagina
order: 2
---
## Introduzione

Breve post, dopo anni di inattività, in cui elenco in ordine alfabetico i feed RSS delle riviste scientifiche maggiormente correlate alla macro-area della biologia vegetale, alias *Plant Science*.

Per un'introduzione generale su cosa sono i feed RSS, come si usano e quali vantaggi offrono, trovate tutto nel post precedente → [Oltrepassare lo Stato dell'Arte...](../feed_rss/index.qmd).

## Plant Science — Feed RSS

1. ACS Publications — ACS Applied Science & Technology [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](http://feeds.feedburner.com/acs/aastgj)
2. ACS Publications — Journal of Agricultural and Food Chemistry [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](http://feeds.feedburner.com/acs/jafcau)
3. ACS Publications — Journal of Natural Products [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](http://feeds.feedburner.com/acs/jnprdf)
4. Acta Physiologiae Plantarum [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://link.springer.com/search.rss?search-within=Journal&facet-journal-id=11738&query=)
5. American Journal of Botany [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://bsapubs.onlinelibrary.wiley.com/feed/15372197/most-recent)
6. Annals of Botany [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://academic.oup.com/rss/site_5260/3126.xml)
7. Annual Review of Biochemistry [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://www.annualreviews.org/action/showFeed?ui=45mu4&mi=3fndc3&ai=se&jc=biochem&type=etoc&feed=atom)
8. Annual Review of Plant Biology [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://www.annualreviews.org/action/showFeed?ui=45mu4&mi=3fndc3&ai=sr&jc=arplant&type=etoc&feed=atom)
9. AoB PLANTS Current Issue [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://academic.oup.com/rss/site_5263/3129.xml)
10. Applications in Plant Sciences [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://bsapubs.onlinelibrary.wiley.com/feed/21680450/most-recent)
11. Biological Sciences — Nature.com subject feeds [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://www.nature.com/subjects/biological-sciences/nature.rss)
12. BMC Molecular and Cell Biology [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://bmcmolcellbiol.biomedcentral.com/articles/most-recent/rss.xml)
13. BMC Plant Biology [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://bmcplantbiol.biomedcentral.com/articles/most-recent/rss.xml)
14. Botanical Studies [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://as-botanicalstudies.springeropen.com/articles/most-recent/rss.xml)
15. Chemistry of Natural Compounds [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://link.springer.com/search.rss?search-within=Journal&facet-journal-id=10600&query=)
16. Communications Biology [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://www.nature.com/commsbio.rss)
17. Critical Reviews in Plant Sciences [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://www.tandfonline.com/feed/rss/bpts20)
18. Current Opinion in Environmental Science & Health [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://rss.sciencedirect.com/publication/science/24685844)
19. Current Opinion in Plant Biology [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://rss.sciencedirect.com/publication/science/13695266)
20. Current Plant Biology [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://rss.sciencedirect.com/publication/science/22146628)
21. Current Protocols [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://currentprotocols.onlinelibrary.wiley.com/feed/26911299/most-recent)
22. Environmental and Experimental Botany [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://rss.sciencedirect.com/publication/science/00988472)
23. Frontiers in Plant Science [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://www.frontiersin.org/journals/plant-science/rss)
24. Functional Plant Biology [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://www.publish.csiro.au/RSS_Feed/CSIRO_Publishing_Recent_FP.xml)
25. Horticulture Research — Nature [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](http://feeds.nature.com/hortres/rss/current)
26. Horticulture Research — OUP [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://academic.oup.com/rss/site_6464/4122.xml)
27. Horticulture, Environment, and Biotechnology [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://link.springer.com/search.rss?search-within=Journal&facet-journal-id=13580&query=)
28. in silico Plants [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://academic.oup.com/rss/site_6190/4018.xml)
29. Journal of Agronomy and Crop Science [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/feed/1439037x/most-recent)
30. Journal of Crop Science and Biotechnology [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://link.springer.com/search.rss?search-within=Journal&facet-journal-id=12892&query=)
31. Journal of Experimental Botany Current Issue [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://academic.oup.com/rss/site_5304/3170.xml)
32. Journal of Horticultural Research [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://intapi.sciendo.com/rss/journal/JOHR)
33. Journal of Plant Biology [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://link.springer.com/search.rss?search-within=Journal&facet-journal-id=12374&query=)
34. Journal of Plant Growth Regulation [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://link.springer.com/search.rss?search-within=Journal&facet-journal-id=344&query=)
35. Journal of Plant Interactions [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://www.tandfonline.com/feed/rss/tjpi20)
36. Journal of Plant Nutrition and Soil Science [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/feed/15222624/most-recent)
37. Journal of Plant Physiology [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://rss.sciencedirect.com/publication/science/01761617)
38. Journal of Plant Research [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://link.springer.com/search.rss?search-within=Journal&facet-journal-id=10265&query=)
39. Journal of Soil Science and Plant Nutrition [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://link.springer.com/search.rss?search-within=Journal&facet-journal-id=42729&query=)
40. Life Science Alliance [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://www.life-science-alliance.org/rss/open.xml)
41. Molecular Breeding [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://link.springer.com/search.rss?search-within=Journal&facet-journal-id=11032&query=)
42. Molecular Horticulture [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://molhort.biomedcentral.com/articles/most-recent/rss.xml)
43. Molecular Plant [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://www.cell.com/molecular-plant/inpress.rss)
44. Molecular Plant Pathology [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://bsppjournals.onlinelibrary.wiley.com/feed/13643703/most-recent)
45. Nature Cell Biology [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](http://feeds.nature.com/ncb/rss/current)
46. Nature Communications [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://www.nature.com/subjects/biological-sciences/ncomms.rss)
47. Nature Plants [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](http://feeds.nature.com/nplants/rss/current)
48. New Phytologist [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/action/showFeed?jc=14698137&type=etoc&feed=rss)
49. PeerJ [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://peerj.com/articles/index.rss2)
50. PeerJ: Plant Biology Section [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://peerj.com/articles/index.atom?section=plant-biology)
51. Photosynthesis Research [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://link.springer.com/search.rss?search-within=Journal&facet-journal-id=11120&query=)
52. Physiologia Plantarum [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/action/showFeed?jc=13993054&type=etoc&feed=rss)
53. Physiology and Molecular Biology of Plants [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://link.springer.com/search.rss?search-within=Journal&facet-journal-id=12298&query=)
54. Phytochemical Analysis [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://analyticalsciencejournals.onlinelibrary.wiley.com/feed/10991565/most-recent)
55. Phytochemistry [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://rss.sciencedirect.com/publication/science/00319422)
56. Phytochemistry Letters [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://rss.sciencedirect.com/publication/science/18743900)
57. Phytochemistry Reviews [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://link.springer.com/search.rss?search-within=Journal&facet-journal-id=11101&query=)
58. Phytopathology [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://apsjournals.apsnet.org/action/showFeed?ui=0&mi=7nl6c5&type=search&feed=rss&query=%2526SeriesKey%253Dphyto%2526field1%253DAllField%2526sortBy%253DEarliest%2526target%253Ddefault%2526text1%253D*)
59. Plant and Cell Physiology [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://academic.oup.com/rss/site_5339/3205.xml)
60. Plant and Soil [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://link.springer.com/search.rss?search-within=Journal&facet-journal-id=11104&query=)
61. Plant Biology [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/feed/14388677/most-recent)
62. Plant Biosystems [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://www.tandfonline.com/feed/rss/tplb20)
63. Plant Biotechnology Journal [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/feed/14677652/most-recent)
64. Plant Biotechnology Reports [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://link.springer.com/search.rss?search-within=Journal&facet-journal-id=11816&query=)
65. Plant Cell & Environment [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/feed/13653040/most-recent)
66. Plant Cell Reports [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://link.springer.com/search.rss?search-within=Journal&facet-journal-id=299&query=)
67. Plant Communications [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://rss.sciencedirect.com/publication/science/25903462)
68. Plant Direct [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/feed/24754455/most-recent)
69. Plant Gene [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://rss.sciencedirect.com/publication/science/23524073)
70. Plant Growth Regulation [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://link.springer.com/search.rss?search-within=Journal&facet-journal-id=10725&query=)
71. Plant Methods [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://plantmethods.biomedcentral.com/articles/most-recent/rss.xml)
72. Plant Molecular Biology [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://link.springer.com/search.rss?search-within=Journal&facet-journal-id=11103&query=)
73. Plant Molecular Biology Reporter [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://link.springer.com/search.rss?search-within=Journal&facet-journal-id=11105&query=)
74. Plant Physiology [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://academic.oup.com/rss/site_6323/4080.xml)
75. Plant Physiology and Biochemistry [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://rss.sciencedirect.com/publication/science/09819428)
76. Plant Production Science [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://www.tandfonline.com/feed/rss/tpps20)
77. Plant Science [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://rss.sciencedirect.com/publication/science/01689452)
78. Plant Sciences — Nature.com subject feeds [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://www.nature.com/subjects/plant-sciences/nature.rss)
79. Plant Signaling & Behavior [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://www.tandfonline.com/feed/rss/kpsb20)
80. Plant Species Biology [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://esj-journals.onlinelibrary.wiley.com/feed/14421984/most-recent)
81. Plant-Environment Interactions [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/feed/25756265/most-recent)
82. Planta [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://link.springer.com/search.rss?search-within=Journal&facet-journal-id=425&query=)
83. PLOS One — Plant Science [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://journals.plos.org/plosone/search/feed/atom?sortOrder=DATE_NEWEST_FIRST&filterJournals=PLoSONE&unformattedQuery=subject%3A%22plant+science%22)
84. Protoplasma [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://link.springer.com/search.rss?search-within=Journal&facet-journal-id=709&query=)
85. Quantitative Plant Biology [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://www.cambridge.org/core/rss/product/id/BD9241015AEEB8FF1F4F2A38C560A3A5)
86. Science [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://www.science.org/action/showFeed?type=axatoc&feed=rss&jc=science)
87. Science Advances [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://www.science.org/action/showFeed?type=etoc&feed=rss&jc=sciadv)
88. ScienceDirect: Biochemistry and Biophysics Reports [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://rss.sciencedirect.com/publication/science/24055808)
89. Scientific Reports [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://www.nature.com/subjects/biological-sciences/srep.rss)
90. Soil Science and Plant Nutrition [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://www.tandfonline.com/feed/rss/tssp20)
91. The Botanical Review [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://link.springer.com/search.rss?search-within=Journal&facet-journal-id=12229&query=)
92. The Plant Cell [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://academic.oup.com/rss/site_6317/4077.xml)
93. The Plant Journal [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/action/showFeed?jc=1365313x&type=etoc&feed=rss)
94. Theoretical and Experimental Plant Physiology [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://link.springer.com/search.rss?search-within=Journal&facet-journal-id=40626&query=)
95. Tree Physiology Current Issue [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://academic.oup.com/rss/site_5247/3115.xml)
96. Trends in Plant Science [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://rss.sciencedirect.com/publication/science/13601385)
97. Weed Research [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/feed/13653180/most-recent)
98. Weed Science [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://www.cambridge.org/core/rss/product/id/279C3F50B926CC9F3061C31162FADD80)
99. Weed Technology [![](Feed-icon.png){width="20"}](https://www.cambridge.org/core/rss/product/id/96F2DAEB1066989CF72064E97B1D8112)
